item.title: Full metadata paper
item.description:
reply.relevance=9 reply.impact=8
Highest h-index author on this paper: Jane Q. Researcher (h-index 42) First author institution: Massachusetts Institute of Technology Last author institution: Stanford University
Abstract — We demonstrate structured parsing of curated RSS descriptions. Second line of abstract continues here.

item.title: Scores and abstract only

Older-style item with no bibliographic block. This paragraph is the abstract.

item.title: Combined institution line

This abstract follows a combined affiliation line.
